category_title: Extremely shy students with social engagement difficulties
scenario_title: Digital picture creation on fairness and honesty
minimal_context: The student is using drawing software during an alternative lunch time session to create a digital picture depicting fair play and honesty in rugby league.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to create your digital picture using the drawing software. Please make a visual representation showing your ideas about fairness and honesty, like 'no cheating' in rugby league.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stares at the blank screen on the drawing software, shrinking back slightly in her chair and remaining completely silent in the peer group setting.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and start drawing your picture.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps her hands in her lap, looking down anxiously and avoiding any interaction with the other students at the table.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to finish your designated work before this lunch time option is over.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the mouse away, crosses her arms, and turns her body away from the computer, exhibiting complete work refusal and high anxiety.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to create your digital picture using the drawing software. Please make a visual representation showing your ideas about fairness and honesty, like 'no cheating' in rugby league.

STUDENT: (Stares at the blank screen on the drawing software, shrinking back slightly in her chair and remaining completely silent in the peer group setting.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and start drawing your picture.

STUDENT: (Keeps her hands in her lap, looking down anxiously and avoiding any interaction with the other students at the table.)

TUTOR: You need to finish your designated work before this lunch time option is over.

STUDENT: (Pushes the mouse away, crosses her arms, and turns her body away from the computer, exhibiting complete work refusal and high anxiety.)

task.content: Creating a digital picture using a drawing software tool depicting their ideas and key message about the topic (visual representation of fair play and ‘no cheating’ in rugby league)
task.learning_goal: Building upon their learning so far about fairness and honesty

context.time_context: Alternative ‘lunch time’ option to playing handball

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When tasked with completing normal classroom work such as journaling, interpreting texts, graphing, drawing, computing
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Showing signs of disengagement from school, work refusal

behavior_patterns.condition: When faced with standard classroom participation requirements
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Exhibiting behaviours that made full-participation in the classroom difficult, truancy or work refusal
